title: text-strong
text: text-strong (brandcolor-textstrong): primary readable text on a surface — card titles, main labels. In prompts say text-strong; output text-brandcolor-textstrong. Do not use raw hex in class attributes.

title: text-weak
text: text-weak (brandcolor-textweak): secondary copy — subtitles, supporting lines, body on cards. Pair with text-strong for hierarchy.

title: primary brand
text: brandcolor-primary: main CTA background. Use bg-brandcolor-primary, hover:bg-brandcolor-primaryhover, label text-brandcolor-white.

title: micro spacing
text: micro spacing token: smallest step — icon+label, chips. Tailwind gap-micro, p-micro, space-x-micro. Not gap-2.

title: tight spacing
text: tight: inside-component vertical rhythm (title+meta). gap-tight, space-y-tight. Inside card body; use cozy for card shell.

title: cozy spacing
text: cozy: default card shell padding. p-cozy or p-card-pad-default when user says default card padding.

title: section spacing
text: section: space between page blocks. mt-section, mb-section, gap-section.

title: card surface
text: Card surface: rounded-lg border border-brandcolor-strokeweak bg-brandcolor-white shadow-card. Single outer padding on card shell.

title: primary button
text: Primary button: rounded-md, bg-brandcolor-primary, text-brandcolor-white, hover:bg-brandcolor-primaryhover, active:shadow-button-press.

title: product sidebar
text: Full nav shell: prefer one productSidebar node (canvas plan v2) with sections/items rather than many loose cards.
